I want you to build a complete Fasteners e-commerce/catalog management system inside my existing project.

This is a professional industrial fasteners website project, so structure it properly like a real business inventory system.

---

## 🧩 1. Database / Data Structure

Create a proper product model (database or JSON structure depending on project setup) with the following fields:

* id (auto-generated)
* name (string)
* category (enum/string)
* subcategory (optional)
* size (optional, e.g. M6, M8, M10, inches)
* material (MS / SS / Brass / Alloy Steel)
* finish (Zinc / Black / Plain / Galvanized)
* description (text)
* price (optional)
* imageUrl (string)
* stock (optional)
* createdAt (timestamp)

---

## 📦 2. Categories and Products

Create these main categories:

### 🔩 Bolts

* Hex Bolt (Full Thread / Half Thread)
* Carriage Bolt
* Eye Bolt
* U Bolt
* J Bolt
* Anchor Bolt
* Flange Bolt
* Allen Bolt (Socket Head Cap Screw)
* Stud Bolt

### 🔩 Nuts

* Hex Nut
* Lock Nut (Nylock Nut)
* Wing Nut
* Cap Nut
* Flange Nut
* Square Nut
* Coupling Nut
* Weld Nut

### 🔩 Screws

* Self Tapping Screw
* Self Drilling Screw
* Machine Screw
* Wood Screw
* Drywall Screw
* Set Screw (Grub Screw)
* Socket Head Screw
* Countersunk Screw

### 🔩 Washers

* Plain Washer
* Spring Washer
* Lock Washer
* Fender Washer
* Tooth Lock Washer
* Flat Washer
* Belleville Washer

### 🔩 Rivets

* Blind Rivet (Pop Rivet)
* Solid Rivet
* Semi Tubular Rivet
* Drive Rivet
* Structural Rivet

### 🔩 Anchors

* Wedge Anchor
* Sleeve Anchor
* Chemical Anchor
* Drop-in Anchor
* Expansion Anchor
* Hammer Drive Anchor

### 🔩 Studs

* Full Thread Stud
* Double End Stud
* Tap End Stud
* Threaded Rod (All Thread)
* Welding Stud

---

## 🧑‍💼 3. Admin Panel Features

Create a complete admin dashboard with:

* Login protected admin access
* Add new product form
* Edit existing product
* Delete product
* View all products in table/grid
* Search and filter by category
* Image upload support (if possible)

---

## 🌐 4. Frontend Website Features

* Dynamic product listing from database
* Category-wise filtering (Bolts, Nuts, etc.)
* Product detail page
* Responsive design (mobile friendly)
* Clean industrial UI (professional look)

---

## 🔗 5. Backend/API Requirements

If using Node.js:

* Create REST APIs:

  * GET /products
  * POST /products
  * PUT /products/:id
  * DELETE /products/:id

If using any DB:

* Connect properly (MongoDB / Firebase / SQL depending on setup)

---

## 🔐 6. Authentication

* Secure admin login system
* Use environment variables for credentials
* Protect admin routes

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS

* Do NOT break existing project structure
* Integrate with current login system if already present
* Make sure data flows correctly between admin panel → database → frontend
* Ensure project runs without errors
* Provide clean, production-ready code

---

## 🎯 FINAL GOAL

A fully working industrial fasteners system:

* Admin panel for managing products
* Database connected system
* Dynamic frontend product display
* Production-ready structure
